pages.title: About Me | Anna Dixon MP for Shipley
pages.meta_description: Learn more about Anna Dixon MP, a proud Yorkshirewoman and Labour Party Member of Parliament for Shipley. Discover her background in advocating for the NHS, social care, and her commitment to addressing local issues, including inequality, community welfare, and revitalising local areas.
pages.text_excerpt: --> About Me | Anna Dixon MP for Shipley top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. About me I am a proud Yorkshirewoman, born and raised just up the road in Ilkley. I attended local state schools where I learned the values of fairness and honesty—principles that continue to guide me to this day. My life has been closely intertwined with Shipley constituency since a young age. From long walks on the moors above Baildon, visiting school friends in Burley-in-Wharfedale, my Mum serving as a magistrate in Bingley, and days out in Saltaire. I now live just outside Bingley and enjoy being actively involved in the community. After graduating from university, I committed my career to protecting our NHS and securing better care and support for older and disabled people and their carers. Over the past twenty years, I have worked nationally and internationally on health and social care, influencing national plans and priorities. In 2015, I set up and led a national charity on ageing, securing changes to policy on housing, employment support, and pensions. Six years later, my contribution was recognised with the award of an MBE. Towns and villages across Shipley constituency have experienced the impact of more than a decade of austerity and hollow promises from the Conservatives. Having seen first-hand the growing inequalities, I knew that our local area needed someone to stand up for us in Parliament. And that’s why I decided to stand as the Labour Party candidate at the 2024 General Election. Since being elected as the Member of Parliament for Shipley, I have been working hard to deliver on your priorities and be a strong voice for our communities in Westminster. Get in touch © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP. All rights reserved. Contact Me: Email: anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk ​ Address: House of Commons, London, SW1A OAA Phone: 01274 790279 Social Channels bottom of page

pages.title: Surgeries and Advice | Anna Dixon MP
pages.text_excerpt: --> Surgeries and Advice | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Surgeries and advice If you need to reach me, please email anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk or phone 01274 720279 providing your name, address and the details of your concern. In some cases, your message will be picked up by a member of my team who will work with you to resolve your issue on my behalf. However, if you need to speak with me personally, I would be happy to arrange a surgery time with you. My surgeries take place over phone or zoom on Friday mornings. If you would like to speak with me face-to-face I am also holding ‘Ask Anna’ events across the constituency over the coming months. You are very welcome to join me to discuss any concerns you have, whether local or national. Please note that for security reasons the exact location will be given 12 hours before the event. ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ The events currently in my calendar are: ​ ​ ​ Friday, 13 March 2026 - Saltaire Thursday, 9 April 2026 - Bingley Friday, 17 April 2026 - Baildon Friday, 15 May 2026 - Windhill ​ You can reserve a spot for an Ask Anna event here: Anna Dixon, Labour MP for Shipley Events - 1 Upcoming Activities and Tickets | Eventbrite In addition, I will be holding regular Facebook live sessions to make myself as accessible as possible. These will run in a similar way to the in-person events. Constituents are invited to submit questions ahead of the session, which I can respond to live on Facebook. © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP. All rights reserved. Contact Me: Email: anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk ​ Address: House of Commons, London, SW1A OAA Phone: 01274 790279 Social Channels bottom of page

pages.text_excerpt: --> Neighbourhood Survey | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Neighbourhood Survey Fill out my survey below and let me know your priorities for you local community. First name Last name Email Postcode What do you enjoy most about living in your area? Which of the following matter the most to you? (Select Multiple) Local roads and footpaths Crime and anti-social behaviour Public transport Community centres and services Playgrounds and green spaces Health and care services Housing Education and employment support Culture and leisure facilities Other What would be the one change or improvment you would like to see in you community? Explain below: I want to keep up to date with the activites of Anna Dixon MP by signing up to recieve her email newsletter. Submit Thank you! Your form has been submitted. This data is collected by Anna Dixon MP. Anna Dixon MP does not share any of your personal data or any of the answers you have provided in any surveys. Personal information is only kept for as long as it is necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. To understand more about how your personal data is used, please visit: https://www.annadixonmp.co.uk/privacy-policy or contact Anna Dixon MP via email on info@annadixonmp.co.uk . © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP. All rights reserved. Contact Me: Email: anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk ​ Address: House of Commons, London, SW1A OAA Phone: 01274 790279 Social Channels bottom of page

pages.meta_description: Read the latest speeches and parliamentary questions from Anna Dixon MP, addressing key issues such as NHS reform, Social Care, the economy, and local Shipley concerns. Stay updated on her contributions in Parliament and her efforts to advocate for her constituents.

pages.text_excerpt: --> Speeches and Questions | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Speeches and Questions Shipley MP continues campaign for electoral reform Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her long-standing campaign for reform of the UKs electoral system, sighting the strong public support for proportional representation in Parliament. Feb 23 Anna Dixon MP champions Bradford’s young construction talent in Parliament following Airedale Hospital visit Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today highlighted the achievements of Bradford’s young people and the importance of vocational education in the House of Commons during Prime Minister’s Questions. Feb 11 Shipley MP Demands Action to Clean Up Local Rivers and Protect Billpayers Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her campaign for urgent reform of the water industry, citing in Parliament “years” of pollution, under‑investment and rising bills that have hit her constituents. Feb 10 Local MP Calls for Tougher Action on Dangerous Driving as She Shares Personal Family Tragedy Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today urged the Government to take bold action to tackle dangerous driving, drawing on her own family’s experience of losing a loved one in a fatal road collision. Feb 5 1 2 3 4 5 © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP. All rights reserved.
